A committee of 8 team members must be formed from a team of 19 engineers and 34 programmers

# how many different committees are possible
# how many different committees have exactly one engineer
# how many different committees have at most one engineer
# how many different committees have at least one engineer

== Permutations with repititions ==
[https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/content/images/2020/04/Permutations3.png External image link]
[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Chapter 4.4 Permutations and combinations]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Chapter 4.4 Permutations and combinations]][[sn:Chapter 4.4 Permutations and combinations]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
